Event: Magic Training - Batsquirrel
Event Date: 23/04/2025
Sage Bot Item Code: D23
Batsquirrel Trainer Daggers

When attacking, has a [12%-13%] chance of dealing [100%-120%] damage in 5 seconds.
For the duration of the battle, the unit has a 45% chance to block melee attacks.

When absorbing damage, the dagger owner stuns 2 nearby enemy units for 3 sec. The effect can be triggered only once in 1,5 sec. When the stun wears off, the enemy units are thrown off balance. They are unable to dodge and deal critical damage for 3 sec.

When taking damage from a ranged attack, the unit also has a 25% chance to deal physical damage equal to 50% of the damage taken to the attacker.

Requirements: 98-100

User rating: item not rated yet
